title: External-capable WORM terminal-receipt append intent (S1.2A)
description: Source-only external-capable append intent for the terminal_receipt_external_worm_sink_v1 Adapter. Wraps a reused terminal_receipt_append_intent_v1 base intent (target_class=external_worm) and binds a NON-SECRET external-destination contract (endpoint/region/bucket/object_lock_mode/retain_until/credential_channel_id). credential_channel_id is only an out-of-band CHANNEL IDENTIFIER (IAM/workload role, short-lived STS, or a named profile/env-channel id the operator configures on the host); NEVER a credential value. No external WORM destination is bound and no real append happens before S8.6. object_lock_mode=COMPLIANCE requires compliance_operator_approved=true. Contract completeness and the COMPLIANCE gate are enforced in the delegated Python validator.
